data_description.training_days: The longer the better. Starting with 30 days, you get usable results. Above 180, improvements will be minor, above 365 more or less nonexistant. If you do significant changes to your solar installation, make sure you set this short enough to not mix trainign data.
data_description.resolution_15m: Not needed for energy dashboard display, but might be useful if you require a higher resolution forecast for automations, scripts, ...
